title: verbascum phlomoides var. adulterinum
intro: Verbascum phlomoides var. adulterinum is a variety of the Mullein plant, known for its tall spikes of yellow flowers and its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its soothing and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum phlomoides var. adulterinum include reducing inflammation and improving sleep quality, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for various forms of use, including topical application and internal consumption.
